fact: WebSocket bridge must handle both NDJSON (Claude Code) and JSON-RPC (Codex) protocols
recommendation: Always test protocol changes against both backends

fact: Session state persists to $TMPDIR/vibe-sessions/ as JSON and survives server restarts
recommendation: Test session recovery after server restart when changing session-related code

fact: Every frontend component must have .test.tsx with render + axe a11y scan
recommendation: Create test file alongside component, include toHaveNoViolations()
